message:
fix(core): deref root_page in RetainedAutocommitOverlayFastPath::root_page

The \`RetainedAutocommitOverlayFastPath::root_page\` method shifted
from \`self\` to \`&self\` in the projected-rowid-lookup commit
because the new \`ProjectedRowidLookup\` variant holds an
Arc<[PreparedMemValueSource]> that forces \`Copy\` off the enum.
The match arms still destructured \`root_page\` without dereferencing
it, so the borrowed form returned \`&i32\` against the declared
\`-> i32\` return type. Add the missing \`*root_page\` deref so the
accessor returns \`i32\` as documented.

One-character correction. No behavior change relative to the Copy-
era form.
